Script.name: DINV_Loader
Script.script:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- DINV - Durel's Inventory Manager for Mudlet -- Ported from MUSHclient plugin aard_inventory.xml ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
DINV = DINV or {} DINV.version = { major = 2, minor = 56 }
-- Get the Mudlet profile directory for module loading local profilePath = getMudletHomeDir() DINV.modulePath = profilePath .. "/DINV/"
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Module Loader ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function DINV.loadModule(name) local path = DINV.modulePath .. name .. ".lua" local file = io.open(path, "r") if file then file:close() local chunk, err = loadfile(path) if chunk then local ok, result = pcall(chunk) if ok then return true else cecho("<red>[DINV] Error executing " .. name .. ": " .. tostring(result) .. "\n") end else cecho("<red>[DINV] Error loading " .. name .. ": " .. tostring(err) .. "\n") end else cecho("<orange>[DINV] Module not found: " .. path .. "\n") end return false end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Initialize DINV ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function DINV.initialize() cecho("\n<cyan>[DINV] Initializing Durel's Inventory Manager v" .. DINV.version.major .. "." .. DINV.version.minor .. "\n")
-- Load modules in order local modules = { "dinv_dbot", -- Core utilities "dinv_notify", -- Notification channel controls "dinv_inv_core", -- Inventory core "dinv_debug", -- Debug utilities "dinv_inv_config", -- Configuration "dinv_inv_items", -- Item management "dinv_discovery", -- Inventory discovery triggers "dinv_inv_cache", -- Item cache "dinv_inv_priority",-- Stat priorities "dinv_inv_score", -- Item scoring "dinv_inv_set", -- Equipment sets "dinv_inv_weapon", -- Weapon sets "dinv_inv_snapshot",-- Snapshots "dinv_inv_analyze", -- Analysis "dinv_levelup", -- Level-up notification mode/settings "dinv_inv_usage", -- Usage tracking "dinv_inv_compare", -- Item comparison "dinv_inv_statbonus",-- Stat bonuses "dinv_inv_consume", -- Consumables "dinv_inv_portal", -- Portals "dinv_inv_pass", -- Area passes "dinv_inv_regen", -- Regen ring "dinv_inv_organize",-- Organization "dinv_inv_keyword", -- Keywords "dinv_inv_tags", -- Command tags "dinv_inv_unused", -- Unused items "dinv_inv_discover",-- Discover command helpers "dinv_inv_report", -- Report output "dinv_rid", -- Rid test reporting "dinv_cli", -- CLI routing "dinv_triggers", -- Mudlet triggers "dinv_aliases", -- Mudlet aliases }
local loaded = 0 local failedModules = {} for _, module in ipairs(modules) do if DINV.loadModule(module) then loaded = loaded + 1 else table.insert(failedModules, module) end end
cecho("<cyan>[DINV] Loaded " .. loaded .. " modules\n") if #failedModules > 0 then cecho("<yellow>[DINV] Failed to load " .. #failedModules .. " modules (" .. table.concat(failedModules, ", ") .. ")\n") end
-- Initialize if critical modules loaded if dbot and inv then -- Initialize dbot if dbot.init and dbot.init.atInstall then dbot.init.atInstall() end
-- Initialize inv if inv.init and inv.init.atInstall then inv.init.atInstall() end
-- Register triggers and aliases if DINV.triggers and DINV.triggers.init then DINV.triggers.init() end
if DINV.discovery and DINV.discovery.init then DINV.discovery.init() end
if DINV.aliases and DINV.aliases.init then DINV.aliases.init() end
-- Register GMCP handlers (base/status) DINV.registerGMCPHandlers()
cecho("<green>[DINV] Initialization complete!\n\n") return true else cecho("<red>[DINV] Critical modules failed to load!\n") return false end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- GMCP Event Handlers ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function DINV.registerGMCPHandlers() registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.base", "DINV.onGMCPCharBase") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.status", "DINV.onGMCPCharStatus") end
function DINV.onGMCPCharBase() if dbot and dbot.gmcp then dbot.gmcp.isInitialized = true if inv and inv.init and inv.init.atActive and not inv.init.initializedActive then inv.init.atActive() end end end
function DINV.onGMCPCharStatus() if dbot and dbot.gmcp and dbot.gmcp.updateState then dbot.gmcp.updateState() end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Auto-start check ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
local checkPath = DINV.modulePath .. "dinv_dbot.lua" local checkFile = io.open(checkPath, "r") if checkFile then checkFile:close() tempTimer(1, function() DINV.initialize() end) else cecho("\n<orange>DINV: Module files not found at: " .. DINV.modulePath .. "\n") cecho("<cyan>DINV: Please copy DINV module files to that directory, then run:\n") cecho("<yellow> lua DINV.initialize()\n\n") end

Trigger.name: invmon
Trigger.script: if inv and inv.items and inv.items.trigger and inv.items.trigger.invmon then inv.items.trigger.invmon(matches[2], matches[3], matches[4], matches[5]) end local allowOutput = DINV and DINV.debug and DINV.debug.isEnabled and DINV.debug.isEnabled("invmon") if not allowOutput then deleteLine() end

Trigger.name: invitem
Trigger.script: if inv and inv.items and inv.items.trigger and inv.items.trigger.invitem then inv.items.trigger.invitem(matches[2], matches[3]) end

Trigger.name: invdata
Trigger.script: if inv and inv.items and inv.items.trigger and inv.items.trigger.invdata then inv.items.trigger.invdata(matches[2]) end

Trigger.name: eqdata
Trigger.script: if inv and inv.items and inv.items.trigger and inv.items.trigger.eqdata then inv.items.trigger.eqdata(matches[2]) end

Trigger.name: You raise a level!
Trigger.script:
local mode = (inv and inv.levelup and inv.levelup.getArmedMode and inv.levelup.getArmedMode()) or nil local defaultPriority = (inv and inv.priority and inv.priority.getDefault and inv.priority.getDefault()) or "navi"
if not mode then if inv and inv.levelup and inv.levelup.getDebug and inv.levelup.getDebug() then dbot.printRaw("@D[DINV DEBUG] XML levelup trigger fired but levelup mode is OFF; skipping dry run.@w") end return end
if inv and inv.levelup and inv.levelup.getDebug and inv.levelup.getDebug() then dbot.printRaw(string.format( "@D[DINV DEBUG] XML levelup trigger fired: priority='@Y%s@D', mode='@W%s@D'.@w", tostring(defaultPriority), tostring(mode))) end
expandAlias("dinv set test " .. tostring(defaultPriority) .. " " .. tostring(mode), false)
